arts.ttl: Ousmane Dembele Drops Two Words That Help Set Stage for PSG-Liverpool Clash
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain cruised to a 4-0 victory over LOSC Lille on Saturday night at the Parc des Princes, thanks to a dominant first half that saw them score all four goals. The Parisians set the tone early when Bradley Barcola found the back of the net in the sixth minute, putting PSG up 1-0. arts.ttl: Aston Villa Face Unexpected Dilemma as Real Sociedad Pursue €20M-Rated PSG Loanee
arts.sum: Marco Asensio is excelling on loan at Aston Villa, scoring a brace in their FA Cup win over Cardiff City on Friday night. Moreover, he’s scored a brace in two of his last three matches for the Premier League side. arts.ttl: PSG blows Lille away 4-1 to warm up for Liverpool in Champions League
arts.sum: Khvicha Kvaratskhelia watched the goals from the substitutes’ bench as PSG coach Luis Enrique rested the Georgia star ahead of Liverpool’s visit in the Champions League. Bradley Barcola opened the scoring in the sixth minute on a rebound after Lille goalkeeper Lucas Chevalier saved Ousmane Dembelé’s initial effort.

arts.ttl: Video: PSG’s Ousmane Dembele Celebrates 100 Goals Thanks to Joao Neves’ Perfect Setup
arts.sum: Ousmane Dembele is one of the hottest footballers right now and continued this impressive form on Saturday night against LOSC Lille. The top scorer in Ligue 1 was perfectly set up by Neves and finished with a smooth side-footed shot. Dembele added a third, sealing the win for an unstoppable PSG. arts.ttl: Bayern Munich Plot Raid of €40M-Rated Talent, Fueling Arsenal, PSG’s Transfer Plans
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain have been monitoring Bayern Munich midfielder Joshua Kimmich for months, nearly securing a deal last summer. Now, they’re making another push to sign him. Journalist Christian Falk recently reported that PSG are still strongly interested in Kimmich, whose contract situation at Bayern Munich remains unresolved.
